name: First State Bank
description_short: Russellville, AR's First State Bank branch at 3103 E Main St provides local banking services to residents and businesses.
description_long:
The First State Bank branch in Russellville, AR is located at 3103 E Main St, operating as a standalone facility serving the local community. This branch provides convenient access to banking services for Russellville residents and area businesses. Contact the branch directly to confirm current hours of operation.

At this Russellville location, customers can access standard banking services including account management, deposits, and lending products. The branch team is available to help with personal and business banking needs. Stop by the First State Bank branch on E Main St to speak with a banker about your financial goals.

If you're a Russellville, AR resident looking for reliable local banking, this First State Bank location provides a personal touch to your banking experience. Bring a valid ID when opening an account or conducting major transactions. The bank is committed to serving the financial needs of the Russellville community.
services: Checking accounts with online banking access
Savings accounts including Christmas Club Savings Accounts
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinance
Card Suite Lite debit card security features
pros: FDIC-insured accounts backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Multiple branch locations with extended drive-thru hours (7 a.m.-7 p.m. weekdays)
24/7 ATM access at all locations plus Interactive Teller Machine technology
Online account opening available anytime for convenience
Instant issue debit cards available in minutes at any branch location
Dedicated mortgage department with specialized lending support
Specialized savings products like Christmas Club Savings Accounts for goal-based saving
Local branch managers and personalized customer service at each location
cons: No interest rates, fees, or account minimum information disclosed on website
Limited geographic service area restricted to central Arkansas (no national presence)
No details provided about checking account features, rewards, or APY rates
Limited mortgage product information (no specific loan types, rates, or terms listed)
No comparison tools or calculators to help customers evaluate accounts
best_for: Central Arkansas residents seeking traditional FDIC-insured community banking
Homebuyers in the Russellville and Fayetteville areas needing mortgage financing
Customers preferring in-person banking relationships and local branch access
Savers looking for specialty accounts like Christmas Club with goal-based features
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for central Arkansas residents seeking traditional community banking with FDIC insurance, local branch relationships, and extended service hours. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing information (rates, fees, minimums) on their website, requiring customers to contact branches directly to compare account features and loan terms with competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Russellville, AR: First State Bank at 3103 E Main St — local banking services for the community.
